raw_consumer_statement:
ISSUE # 1 I called my BestBuy Citi to make a payment on a non promotional balance and the representative advised me a different amount than the purchase amount. I asked him why is the amount higher, he advised me it was due to a promotional balance that was not paid off in time and left some balance of around XXXX dollars. I advised I was making more than the advertised amount per month to payoff the balance within 12 month ( which is the 0.00 % period ). I asked for a payments history and the agent we do not provide history from XX/XX/XXXX. I asked him to send me the statements electronically he said no. They have to be mailed. 

ISSUE # XXXX Citi seems to be hiding the non promotional balances online. When you try to make a payment it should allow you to target payments to a specific promotion if you have multiple or non promotional balance due. If you want to make a payment, you can pay total amount, minimum payment, other amount. Why is it not showing the break down of the promotion non promotional balance? What if I wan na pay towards sonething specific. Please note all this when I have auto pay pulling so it not interfering with the regular monthly payments. This information should be accessible on the web. 

ISSUE # 3 If I have a remaining balance since XXXX of XXXX for XXXX some dollars and I pay XXXX dollars every month since XXXX of XXXX how Im I accruing interest on a remaining XXXX or XXXX or even XXXX dollars? Shouldn't payments apply to outstanding interest first?
